TEMPLATE_1_AGENCIES:
# 1. Agencies

Hi {{Name}},

Quick question.

How do you currently collect client testimonials?

Most agencies I've spoken with are still using WhatsApp, email, or Google Forms, which often means great client feedback gets lost or never gets collected.

We've built Clientalio to simplify the process:

1️⃣ Create a testimonial template

2️⃣ Generate a branded invite link

3️⃣ Send it to your client

4️⃣ Clients can submit:

🎥 Video Testimonials

🖥️ Screen + Webcam Reviews

✍️ Text Testimonials

5️⃣ Manage everything from one dashboard and publish it to your website

We're currently offering free early access to our first users and would love feedback from agency owners.

Interested in taking a look?

🌐 [clientalio.com](http://clientalio.com)
TEMPLATE_2_CEOS_FOUNDERS:
# 3. CEOs / Founders

Hi {{Name}},

Quick question.

How do you currently collect customer testimonials?

Many businesses have happy customers but very few testimonials that actually make it onto their website.

We've built Clientalio to make testimonial collection simple.

🖥️ Screen + Webcam Reviews

✍️ Text Testimonials

Interested?

🌐 [clientalio.com](http://clientalio.com)
